summary: The presenter demonstrates the Astria fashion-AI platform, focusing on how to modify a generated image by changing the model's face and applying a text prompt. They start with a base image of a woman in a tank top and jeans, then update her hairstyle and face using pre-defined references. Finally, they apply a detailed text prompt to generate a new image based on specific characteristics and background.
ui_state: The dominant on-screen view is the Astria image generation interface, featuring a 3x3 grid of content slots (Pose, Face, Jacket, Top, Accessories, Footwear, Bottom, Background) at the top, a prompt input area below, and a generated image display. A right-side panel shows image generation details and history.

interactions.target_description: Face slot in the content grid
Face slot in the content grid
interactions.outcome: The Face slot updates to display 'hair bun, sleek hair', and the prompt text area below updates to include 'hair bun, sleek hair'.

interactions.target_description: Button to generate image based on prompt
interactions.outcome: The system begins processing, and a new image is generated showing the model with a hair bun and sleek hair. Processing details appear in the right panel.

interactions.target_description: Pencil icon (Edit) on the generated image thumbnail
interactions.outcome: A dropdown menu appears with editing options.

interactions.target_description: Option in the dropdown menu to edit the pose
interactions.outcome: The image opens in a mask editing interface.

interactions.target_description: Drawing tool over the model's body
interactions.outcome: A purple mask is drawn over the model's body.

interactions.target_description: Drawing tool over the model's head
interactions.outcome: A purple mask is drawn over the model's head.

interactions.target_description: Button to save the drawn mask
interactions.outcome: The mask editing interface closes, returning to the main UI.

interactions.target_description: Face slot in the content grid

interactions.outcome: The list of public models scrolls down, revealing more options.

interactions.target_description: Specific public model reference in the list
interactions.outcome: The 'Search references' modal closes. The 'Face' slot updates to show Sasha's face, and the prompt text area updates to reflect the new face.

interactions.target_description: Button to generate image based on prompt
interactions.outcome: The system begins processing, and a new image is generated showing the model with Sasha's face. Processing details appear in the right panel.

interactions.target_text: Describe your image. Type '/' to add a reference
interactions.outcome: The text 'unique israel woman, with French and Japanese decent, fair skin, studio white background, shoulders up, in clothing' is entered into the prompt area.

interactions.target_description: Button to generate image based on prompt
interactions.outcome: The system begins processing, and a new image is generated based on the detailed text prompt. Processing details appear in the right panel.

notable_ui_affordances: Nano Banana 2 - Genesis 3.1 Flash Image Prev... dropdown
Add a reference (for accessories, footwear, bottom)
open_questions: The exact functionality of the 'Describe' button beyond triggering image generation.
The specific details and implications of the 'Nano Banana 2 - Genesis 3.1 Flash Image Prev...' model.
The meaning of 'Tribes: 136.793K' in the top left corner.
The purpose and content of the 'Lookbook' and 'Video' tabs.
The precise functionality of the 'Custom', '2K', and '1x' settings for image generation.
The meaning of the numbers '3-4' and '2K' displayed next to the model selection dropdown.
The exact meaning of 'Processing: 9s' and 'Cost: $0.000' in the right-hand panel, especially if the cost is always zero.
The full content of the 'short_description' associated with the 'front full body (pose)' element.
